quick_skim.title: SuperCond-GNN: Scalable Graph Neural Network Surrogate for Superconducting Circuit Simulations
quick_skim.abstract: This paper presents SuperCond-GNN, a graph neural network-based surrogate model for predicting the voltage distribution in high-temperature superconducting (HTS) magnets. HTS magnets are modeled as lumped-element equivalent circuits and mapped onto graph representations, enabling message passing GNNs to learn the electrical response as a function of circuit topology, material properties, and operating current. As a proof of concept, tape stacks of up to 10 tapes are considered across a range of circuit topologies and operating conditions. The surrogate is trained on data generated from circuit simulations and achieves a mean MAPE of 4.3 % within the prescribed design space. The predicted nodal voltages enable fast and scalable inference of current redistribution and local operating conditions across a wide range of circuit configurations. The effect of incorporating physics-informed regularization via Kirchhoff's current law is also evaluated, and generalizability to unseen topologies is assessed through zero-shot inference and few-shot fine-tuning. While demonstrated on tape stack circuits, the graph-based framework is topology-agnostic and naturally extensible to more complex HTS cable and magnet configurations, offering a scalable alternative to conventional circuit solvers for downstream applications such as design space exploration, current sharing analysis, and real-time magnet monitoring.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: graph neural network surrogate for circuit simulation, applicable to PDN modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 图神经网络代理模型用于电路仿真，可迁移至PDN建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 图神经网络代理模型用于电路仿真，可迁移至PDN建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 图神经网络代理模型用于电路仿真，可迁移至PDN建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: A GNN surrogate predicts voltage distribution in HTS magnet equivalent circuits, achieving 4.3% MAPE, enabling fast scalable circuit simulation. Method transferable to PDN optimization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对高温超导磁体集总参数等效电路的电压分布预测问题，提出图神经网络代理模型SuperCond-GNN。该方法将电路拓扑映射为图结构，用消息传递机制学习电路响应，在十带堆叠设计中实现4.3%平均百分比误差。该代理模型可替代传统电路仿真，提供快速可扩展的电压预测，其方法论可推广至电源分配网络（PDN）的阻抗建模与优化。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对高温超导磁体集总参数等效电路的电压分布预测问题，提出图神经网络代理模型SuperCond-GNN。该方法将电路拓扑映射为图结构，用消息传递机制学习电路响应，在十带堆叠设计中实现4.3%平均百分比误差。该代理模型可替代传统电路仿真，提供快速可扩展的电压预测，其方法论可推广至电源分配网络（PDN）的阻抗建模与优化。
